examples: When forty winters shall besiege thy brow.
Are the trees of the field people, that you should besiege them?
They will besiege all the cities throughout the land the LORD your God is giving you.
This does not deter his devotees, who besiege the shop whenever a new flavour appears.
Obamacare, Dodd-Frank and other laws still in implementation threaten to besiege posterity under bureaucratic assault.
